penalties.description: Task appears to be a tutorial demonstration rather than a timed performance. No clear timing start or completion sequence is visible.

reasoning: This appears to be an educational tutorial video showing the setup and technique for the ligating loop task rather than an actual timed performance attempt. The video shows the task apparatus and demonstrates loop manipulation around the middle appendage, but lacks clear timing markers for start and completion. No definitive tail cut inside the trainer is observed to mark task completion. Given the tutorial nature and absence of clear performance timing, this cannot be scored as a standard FLS assessment.
